title: sterculia microphylla
intro: Sterculia microphylla, also known as the small leaved sterculia, is a plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. Its health benefits include treating fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions, as well as providing relief from respiratory issues such as cough and bronchitis. In herbal preparations, Sterculia microphylla can be found in the form of extracts, capsules, and infusions, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
